name: fuzzy area
hints: A fuzzy area with warped space. There's a sign. This is the TREASURE ROOM where you drop gems for points.
READ SIGN. LOOK AREA reveals space is warped. DROP all your *Gem* treasures here and SCORE to check progress.
This is the treasure storage room (room 16). DROP all 17 gems here and SCORE. NORTH goes to the underground room (room 15). S/E/W all go to warp (room 18).
Store all gems here for maximum score. NORTH to the underground room. The warped space in S/E/W directions leads to warp room 18.
notes: TREASURE ROOM. Drop all 17 *Gem* treasures here and SCORE. Fuzzy area with warped space. NORTH to underground room (room 15). S/E/W all warp to room 18. Sign provides information about the treasure goal.
